title: chamalium
intro: Chamalium is a plant species belonging to the family Santalaceae, commonly known as the sandalwood family. It is native to Australia and is used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of chamalium include reducing inflammation and pain, treating skin conditions such as acne and eczema, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of chamalium include infusions, tinctures, and topical creams, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
